description: Bookings, bookings provider tags, contacts, customers, leads, locations, tags

env_var_specs.name: ST_CLIENT_ID
env_var_specs.description: ServiceTitan OAuth2 client_id for the integration. Used by the auth login flow to exchange for a bearer token at https://auth.servicetitan.io/connect/token. Whitespace is stripped defensively.

env_var_specs.name: ST_CLIENT_SECRET
env_var_specs.description: ServiceTitan OAuth2 client_secret paired with ST_CLIENT_ID. Whitespace is stripped defensively (a known JKA env gotcha that produced opaque invalid_client 400s).

tools.name: booking-provider_bookings_create
tools.description: Creates a booking for a booking provider. Required: booking_provider, tenant, externalId, isFirstTimeClient, name, source, summary. Optional: address, businessUnitId, campaignId (plus 7 more). Returns the new CrmV2BookingResponse.

params.description: The associated Booking Id to use for creating the Lead. This Booking will be dismissed and a Lead will get created associated to this Booking.

params.description: ID of the call reason. Required if follow up date is not provided.

params.description: Date of when to follow up. Required if call reason ID is not provided.

params.description: Customer name provided for the lead

params.description: Phone number provided for the lead

params.name: isProspect
params.description: Allows to filter leads where the customer doesn't have a job, or there is no customer. Possible values are: null (return all leads); true (return leads without customer/jobs); false (return leads with customer and job)

params.name: withoutCustomer
params.description: Allows to filter leads that don't have a customer or location record associated to it. Possible values are: null (return all leads); true (return leads without customers or locations only); false (return leads with customers and locations only)

params.name: status
params.description: Filters by status Values: [Open, Dismissed, Converted]

params.name: customerCreatedOnOrAfter
params.description: Returns customers who were created on or before a certain date/time (in UTC)

params.name: customerCreatedBefore
params.description: Returns customers who were created after a certain date/time (in UTC)

params.name: customerModifiedOnOrAfter
params.description: Returns customers who were modified on or before a certain date/time (in UTC)

params.description: If true, generates a permanent URL for the lead

Returns array of CrmV2LocationsContactResponse.

tools.name: locations_update
tools.description: Updates a location. Required: id, tenant. Optional: active, address, customFields (plus 5 more). Returns the updated CrmV2LocationsLocationResponse.

params.name: active
params.description: If false, the record has been deactivated.

params.name: customFields
params.description: List of custom fields and their values. This list must describe the full list of custom fields on the location. If location A has values for custom fields X and Y and this field only contains a model for custom field X, then the value for custom field Y on location A will be removed.

params.name: externalData
params.description: Optional model that contains a list of external data items that should be updated to this Location.

params.name: tagTypeIds
params.description: List of tag type IDs. If location has tag types X and Y and this field only contains tag type X, then Y will removed from the location. If it is an empty list, all tags on the location will be removed.

params.name: taxZoneId
params.description: ID of the location tax zone
